author: y4rr
content: [result] Wired backward and broadcast f64 ops end-to-end. Total f64 coverage: 21 PTX kernels (14 arithmetic/unary + 3 backward + 4 broadcast), all with launchers, backend_impl, and dispatch sites. Backward ops (relu, sigmoid, tanh) and broadcast ops (add, sub, mul, div) now fully support f64 on GPU. All 3255 tests pass.
